description: Full legal/official name of the entity
business_rules: Must match official government registration documents exactly

description: Commonly used short/abbreviated name
business_rules: Used for UI/Mobile displays where full name is too long

description: Representative logo URL or image link
format_constraints: Must point to valid image format (png; jpg; svg)
business_rules: Link must resolve to a publicly accessible image; Transparent background preferred

description: Business classification (Startup, MSME, SMB, Investor, VC)
business_rules: Must map to internal standardized business taxonomy
data_rules: Case insensitive match against Enum list

description: Year the company was legally incorporated/founded
business_rules: Cannot be in the future; Cannot be before 1800 (generally)

description: A high-level summary of what the company does and its market position.
business_rules: Should include industry; core product; and target audience keywords

description: Ownership structure (Private, Public, Subsidiary, etc.)
data_rules: Match against allowed Legal Structure Types

description: Primary headquarters address and location
business_rules: Must specify at least City and Country

description: List of countries where the company actively operates
business_rules: Implies revenue generation or physical presence
data_rules: Split by comma; Validate each against Country List
data_source: Annual Report/ Company Website(Added Company website)

description: Number of additional offices excluding headquarters
business_rules: Excludes WeWork hot desks unless permanent; Excludes HQ
data_source: Company Careers Page/ Company Website (Added Company website)

description: Specific addresses/locations of all offices
business_rules: List must include City and Country for each entry
data_rules: Parsing check if JSON; CSV check if text

description: Total headcount/employee size (full-time equivalents)
business_rules: Includes FTEs; Excludes Contractors if possible

description: Current open job roles count and breakdown by department
business_rules: Indicates growth stage; High number = scaling

description: The annual percentage of employees leaving the organization.
The average length of time an employee stays with the company.
business_rules: calculated based on historical exit data

description: Primary customer problems/pain points the company solves
Target industries/sectors using GICS classification
business_rules: Use standard taxonomies (GICS / NAICS) where possible

description: Core products, services, or offerings provided
Top 10-50 customers grouped by segments
Detailed breakdown of specific benefits and unique selling points for customers.
Long-term aspirational goal of the company
Short-term actionable purpose and objectives
Core principles guiding decisions and behavior
data_rules: Keyword check against positive sentiment dict

description: Unique features setting the company apart
Sustainable edges like proprietary tech or network effects
business_rules: Focus on Network Effects; IP; Cost; Brand

description: Notable gaps, limitations, or weaknesses in products/services
Major strategic, operational, or tech challenges faced
business_rules: High volatility based on market conditions

description: Direct and indirect competitors in the market
Strategic tech/alliance partners
2-3 unique/interesting facts or stories about the company
Key news/events from the last 12-24 months with dates
Primary official website URL
format_constraints: Valid HTTPS URL; Avoid trailing slashes
business_rules: Core domain for all tracking metrics
data_rules: Strip http; trailing slashes for deduplication

description: Assessment of site UX, clarity, messaging, professionalism
business_rules: Subjective view by analyst or AI agent

description: Overall website quality score out of 10
Global and US traffic rank
Total followers across all social platforms
business_rules: Aggregates LI; TW; FB; IG; TikTok
data_rules: Sum check = LI + TW + FB + IG

description: Employee/review rating on Glassdoor
Employee/review rating on Indeed
Customer rating on Google Reviews
Official LinkedIn company profile URL
business_rules: Primary B2B social source of truth

description: Official Twitter/X handle
business_rules: Used for social listening and news triggers

description: Official Facebook page URL
Official Instagram page URL
Name of the CEO/equivalent top executive
CEO's LinkedIn profile URL
2-3 key executives: Name, Title, LinkedIn, Email, Phone
data_rules: Valid JSON array or specific delimitation

description: Paths for warm intros (shared investors/board/alumni)
Ease of reaching decision makers (High/Med/Low + reasons)
General company inquiry email
Primary company phone number
Name of main point of contact
business_rules: Requires Data Privacy / GDPR compliance flag

description: Title/role of primary contact
Email of primary contact
data_rules: No freemail (gmail/yahoo) if B2B flag set

description: Phone of primary contact
Recent awards, certifications, or recognitions
Overall brand sentiment (qualitative score + data sources)
data_rules: Must map to standard index 0-100 or Enum

description: Recent conferences/events participated in
Key certifications (SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR, etc.)
Any ongoing/resolved legal issues or controversies
Latest annual revenue figure (exact or estimated)
data_rules: Must include currency code (USD assumed if blank)

description: Latest annual profit/loss
business_rules: EBITDA or Net Income preferred; Clarify which

description: Breakdown of revenue (% recurring vs. one-time/service)
Most recent valuation or estimated value
YoY revenue growth percentage
Current profitability (profitable/break-even/loss-making)
Estimated market share in primary segment
Major investors or backers
business_rules: Signal of due diligence quality (e.g. Sequoia; a16z)
data_rules: Verify entity names against Investor DB

description: Details of recent funding: amount, date, stage
business_rules: Standard stages: Seed; Series A; B; C...

description: Cumulative capital raised to date
ESG practices, scores, or initiatives
Primary sales approach (PLG, Inside, Field Sales)
Average cost to acquire a customer
Average revenue per customer over lifetime
Ratio of CAC to CLV (ideal >3:1)
Annual customer churn percentage
business_rules: Gross or Net Retention flags required

description: Customer satisfaction score (NPS)
Risk if top client >20% of revenue (yes/no + %)
business_rules: Critical risk if >20% revenue from 1 client

description: The amount of venture capital or cash the company spends monthly.
The number of months the company can operate before running out of cash.
Efficiency metric (e.g., net burn / net new ARR)
Patents, trademarks, or key IP owned
R&D spend as % of revenue or absolute amount
Level of AI/ML use with specific examples
Key software/tools/tech stack used
data_rules: Match against Tech Taxonomy (e.g. AWS; React)

description: Cybersecurity certifications or breach history
Critical suppliers and associated risks
Geopolitical/macro risks (e.g., tariffs, regulations)
External large-scale factors (political, economic) that could impact the business.
Workforce diversity breakdown and DEI efforts
Remote/hybrid policy (% remote + productivity impact)
Annual spend on employee training/development
Key strategic partnerships or alliances
Potential or past events like IPOs, acquisitions, or mergers.
Estimated carbon footprint or env. impact
Practices for ethical sourcing/supply chain
Key metrics compared to 3-5 peers
Projected revenue/growth for next 1-3 years
Top 3-5 year priorities, initiatives, resource allocation
Key industry associations, membership level/role, benefits
2-5 public case studies with links and results
Channels, pricing, buyer personas
business_rules: Defines how they sell (Direct; Channel; PLG)
data_rules: Keywords must align with Sales Motion

description: Upcoming products/features, R&D pipeline status
Upcoming features, products, or services currently in development.
business_rules: Differentiate form Roadmap (Specific items vs Timeline)

description: Board/advisor composition, notable members, independence
Links to official video content or channel playlists.
data_rules: Must host on standard video platforms

description: Quotes or video links from verified customers regarding their experience.
A comparison of the company's tech stack maturity against industry peers.
The total global demand or revenue opportunity for a product/service if 100% market share is achieved.
data_rules: Must be >= SAM; Units usually Billions

description: The portion of TAM that is within the company™s geographic and specialized reach.
The specific percentage of SAM that the company realistically targets to capture in the short term.
Describes whether the workplace encourages collaboration and mutual support or promotes internal competition and sustained pressure.
Indicates whether managers focus on coaching, mentoring, and long-term growth versus only driving task completion and short-term outcomes.
Reflects how safe employees feel to speak openly, ask questions, challenge ideas, and admit mistakes without fear of punishment.
Shows whether feedback is continuous and constructive or limited to infrequent, formal review cycles.
Evaluates gender balance, inclusion practices, and whether diversity initiatives are meaningful or purely symbolic.
data_rules: Check for specific ERGs or Stats

description: Measures integrity, transparency, fairness, and how the organization handles ethical dilemmas and failures.
Defines whether work hours are fixed, flexible, or unpredictable on a daily basis.
Assesses whether overtime is occasional and situational or routinely expected.
Indicates how often employees are required to work on weekends.
Describes flexibility in choosing between remote, hybrid, or fully on-site work models.
Evaluates how easy it is to take leaves, including sick leave and mental health days.
data_rules: Check for 'Unlimited' or number of days

description: Measures whether the pace of work is intense but sustainable or leads to frequent burnout and firefighting.
business_rules: High burnout risk correlates with churn

description: Identifies whether the office is located in a central business area or on the city outskirts.
Assesses availability and convenience of public transport options near the office.

column_name: Cab availability and company cab policy
description: Evaluates availability of cabs and whether the company provides transport support.
Measures travel time to the nearest airport, relevant for client-facing or travel-heavy roles.
Indicates whether the office is in a tech park, IT hub, or mixed-use commercial area.
Evaluates safety of the surrounding area during both daytime and late hours.
Assesses company policies related to employee safety, including late-night transport and women safety measures.
Reviews physical safety standards of office infrastructure and facilities.
Measures preparedness for medical, fire, or other emergency situations.
Evaluates quality of health insurance, OPD benefits, and mental health support.
Assesses effectiveness of onboarding programs and initial training.
data_rules: Derived from new hire sentiment surveys

description: Indicates availability of certifications, courses, and internal learning platforms.
Measures exposure to real-world problem solving versus repetitive or low-impact tasks.
Evaluates access to experienced mentors and guidance.
Indicates ease of moving across roles or teams internally.
Clarifies whether promotions are merit-based, time-based, and transparently defined.
Assesses access to modern tools, software, and technologies used in the industry.
Measures how clearly role responsibilities and expectations are defined.
Assesses level of ownership and responsibility given early in the role.
Evaluates whether work impacts internal processes, customers, or revenue directly.
Indicates balance between execution-focused tasks and strategic or analytical thinking.
Measures reliance on automation versus manual or repetitive work.
Assesses opportunities to collaborate with multiple teams or functions.
Identifies whether the company is a startup, scale-up, or mature enterprise.
Evaluates brand recognition and perceived resume value.
Assesses quality of clients and their standing in the industry.
Reviews past instances of layoffs, restructuring, or instability.
Indicates proportion of fixed salary versus variable or performance-linked pay.
business_rules: Sales roles typically high variable; Engineering high fixed

description: Measures consistency and reliability of bonuses.
Evaluates ESOPs or long-term incentives and their actual realized value.
Assesses health insurance coverage for employees and dependents.
Indicates support provided for relocation expenses.
Reviews additional benefits such as meals, transport, and wellness programs.
Tracks typical career paths of former employees.
business_rules: Where do people go next? (MAANG; Founders)

description: Evaluates relevance of skills gained to the broader industry.
Measures recognition and credibility among top-tier employers.
Assesses strength of alumni and leadership networks.
business_rules: Access to VC or high roles later

description: Indicates exposure to global clients, teams, or markets.
Evaluates clarity and consistency of the company™s mission and purpose.
Assesses commitment to sustainability and social responsibility.
Reviews company behavior and decision-making during crises.
business_rules: True test of culture (e.g. Covid response)
